# Model catalog — Genesis Trinity (master spec § 17)

Canonical declaration of the 8 models this system intends to host across Pulse / Logic / Oracle tiers.

This doc is regenerated from `models/catalog.yaml` on every invocation of `scripts/models/render-catalog-md.py`. The same YAML drives `scripts/models/pull.sh` (operator-driven pull) and `scripts/models/verify.sh` (resident integrity check), so the doc, the puller, and the verifier can never drift.

## Catalog summary

| Tier | Count | Verified-real | Aspirational |
|------|-------|---------------|--------------|
| pulse | 3 | 1 | 2 |
| logic | 1 | 0 | 1 |
| oracle | 4 | 4 | 0 |

## Pulse tier (master spec § 17)

### BitNet-b1.58-2B-4T

- **Status:** ✓ verified-real
- **Engine:** `bitnet.cpp`
- **License:** mit
- **HF repo id:** `microsoft/bitnet-b1.58-2B-4T`
- **Parameters:** 849.8 M
- **Master spec:** § 15, § 16, § 20

**Operator note:**

> Pulled by scripts/pulse/build-bitnet.sh as BITNET_MODEL_REPO
> default. The actual Microsoft BitNet release that exists on HF
> today (Dec 2025 update, 850M params trained on 4T tokens).

### BitNet-b1.58-3B

- **Status:** ◌ aspirational
- **Engine:** `bitnet.cpp`
- **License:** mit
- **Master spec:** § 18.1 (ultra-sovereign-efficiency conductor)
- **Runtime profiles:** ultra-sovereign-efficiency
- **Closest real alternative:** `microsoft/bitnet-b1.58-2B-4T`

**Operator note:**

> Master spec § 18.1 names BitNet-b1.58-3B for the
> ultra-sovereign-efficiency profile. No 3B BitNet release on HF
> as of L0 ingest 2026-05-15. Operator substitutes the real
> microsoft/bitnet-b1.58-2B-4T until upstream ships a 3B variant.

### BitNet-b1.58-13B

- **Status:** ◌ aspirational
- **Engine:** `bitnet.cpp`
- **License:** mit
- **Master spec:** § 18.2 (high-concurrency-burst conductor_01)
- **Runtime profiles:** high-concurrency-burst
- **Closest real alternative:** `microsoft/bitnet-b1.58-2B-4T`

**Operator note:**

> Master spec § 18.2 names BitNet-b1.58-13B for the conductor in
> the high-concurrency-burst profile. No 13B BitNet release on HF
> as of L0 ingest 2026-05-15. Operator substitutes 2B-4T as the
> fallback or waits for upstream.

## Logic tier (master spec § 17)

### Qwen-32B-Ternary-Quant

- **Status:** ◌ aspirational
- **Engine:** `vllm-vulkan`
- **License:** apache-2.0
- **Parameters:** 32500.0 M
- **Master spec:** § 18.2 (high-concurrency-burst translator_01)
- **Runtime profiles:** high-concurrency-burst
- **Closest real alternative:** `Qwen/Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct-AWQ`

**Operator note:**

> Master spec § 18.2 names Qwen-32B-Ternary-Quant. No
> ternary-quantized 32B Qwen on HF as of L0 ingest 2026-05-15.
> Closest real is Qwen/Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct-AWQ (1.2M downloads,
> Apache-2.0, 4-bit AWQ — not ternary but the closest available
> compressed variant; vllm-vulkan engine compatible).

## Oracle tier (master spec § 17)

### DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70B-FP16

- **Status:** ✓ verified-real
- **Engine:** `llama.cpp`
- **License:** mit
- **HF repo id:** `deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70B`
- **Parameters:** 70553.7 M
- **Master spec:** § 18.2 (high-concurrency-burst deep_reasoner_01)
- **Runtime profiles:** high-concurrency-burst

**Operator note:**

> Real HF release. Master spec specifies the FP16 variant; HF
> ships base safetensors that the operator runs through
> llama.cpp's quantizer to land FP16 .gguf on /mnt/vault/models/.

### DeepSeek-V3-Quant

- **Status:** ✓ verified-real
- **Engine:** `vllm`
- **License:** other
- **HF repo id:** `deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3`
- **Parameters:** 684531.4 M
- **Master spec:** § 18.3 (deep-context-synthesis synthesizer_01)
- **Runtime profiles:** deep-context-synthesis

**Operator note:**

> Master spec § 18.3 runs this with --tensor-parallel-size 2
> --kv-cache-dtype fp8 across both GPUs (RTX PRO 6000 + RTX 3090).
> Master spec specifies the "Quant" variant; upstream ships FP8
> weights natively on the V3 repo (see repo tags fp8 + Q4/Q8
> community quants).

### Ling-2.6-flash

- **Status:** ✓ verified-real
- **Engine:** `vllm`
- **License:** mit
- **HF repo id:** `inclusionAI/Ling-2.6-flash`
- **Parameters:** 107494.4 M
- **Master spec:** Block 7 (operator addition — RTX PRO 6000 candidate)

**Operator note:**

> Operator-flagged candidate for RTX PRO 6000 96GB hosting.
> bailing_hybrid architecture. Confirmed real on HF Hub at L0
> ingest 2026-05-15.

### Nemotron-3-Nano-Omni-30B-Reasoning-BF16

- **Status:** ✓ verified-real
- **Engine:** `transformers`
- **License:** other
- **HF repo id:** `nvidia/Nemotron-3-Nano-Omni-30B-A3B-Reasoning-BF16`
- **Parameters:** 33015.6 M
- **Master spec:** Block 7 (operator addition — multimodal RTX PRO 6000 candidate)

**Operator note:**

> Operator-flagged candidate. Multimodal (any-to-any).
> NemotronH_Nano_Omni_Reasoning_V3 architecture. Confirmed real
